prompt:
STYLE: a hyper-realistic premium studio product shot, 1:1 square, 4K. Editorial / commercial-catalog style — clean studio environment with refined accent lighting, no text.

SUBJECT: a photorealistic rendering of the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar shown in 3/4 ANGLE VIEW rotated ~25-30° to the RIGHT (so the front face is mostly visible AND the OPPOSITE side panel is partially visible — showing the wraparound circuit-pattern artwork on the back-right). Matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID on top, jar CLOSED, front label fully legible. The jar occupies roughly the central 50-55% of the frame height — ZOOMED OUT with generous breathing room. NOT a tight crop.

LIGHTING — refined accent lighting: soft large key-light from upper-right (mirrored from S2 to show the right-side detail), soft fill from the left, COOL BLUE rim-light tracing the RIGHT edge, WARM GOLD rim-light tracing the LEFT edge — duotone dimensionality. Sharp clean specular highlight on the curved glossy black plastic. Gold lid's curved edge catches a warm gleam. Label reads crisply.

BACKDROP: pure WHITE seamless studio backdrop — no gradient, no horizon line, no atmospheric haze. The jar sits on a clean even WHITE surface with only a SOFT NATURAL DROP-SHADOW directly beneath it (no glossy mirror reflection, no warm cream-gray tones). The scene around the product stays pure white throughout.

NO TEXT, NO graphic overlays, NO scattered gummies, NO props.

STYLE: hyper-realistic product photography, 100mm macro look, f/8 sharp focus, crystal-clear label legibility on the front face and partial visibility of the right-side wraparound artwork, editorial commercial product shot. Hyper-detailed plastic textures with realistic light absorption + glossy reflections. Magazine-print quality.
